allow: Bash(xcodebuild -workspace NickelBrandt.xcworkspace -scheme NickelBrandt -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' -derivedDataPath /tmp/NickelBrandtBuild build)

Bash(xcodebuild -workspace NickelBrandt.xcworkspace -scheme NickelBrandt -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=Any iOS Simulator Device' -derivedDataPath /tmp/NickelBrandtBuild build)
Bash(xcodebuild -workspace NickelBrandt.xcworkspace -scheme NickelBrandt -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/NickelBrandtBuild build)
